parameters-en.Time: Adjusts the delay time of tape head 4. Multi-Head has a maximum delay length of 2.5 seconds, with the delay time divided evenly between the 4 tape heads. So if Time is set to 2.000 seconds, tape head 1's time is 500 ms (2000 / 4 = 500). When set to note values, Time follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Feedback: Controls the number of delay repeats for all four tape heads. When set to 0%, only one repeat is heard. At high values, the Delay may begin to self-oscillate and squeal (perhaps in a good way).
parameters-en.Heads 1-2: Selects whether tape heads 1 and/or 2 are on or off.
parameters-en.Heads 3-4: Selects whether tape heads 3 and/or 4 are on or off.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the delay repeats and the dry signal. At 0%, no repeats are heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
